# Brass Practice

Brass Practice is an iOS music practice app for brass and wind players. It combines MusicXML score display, playback, loop practice, microphone pitch feedback, recordings, and local practice history.

## Primary URL

- https://musicapp-lab.github.io/brass-practice/

## App Store

- TBD_APP_STORE_URL

## Public Pages

- Home: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/brass-practice/
- Support: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/brass-practice/support.html
- Privacy: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/brass-practice/privacy.html
- FAQ: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/brass-practice/faq.html
- app-ads.txt root: https://musicapp-lab.github.io/app-ads.txt

## App Summary

- App name: Brass Practice
- Platform: iOS
- Category: music practice / music education
- Audience: brass and wind players who practice with notation
- Current release path: free ad-supported build with rewarded ads for advanced scoring and review tools
- One rewarded ad unlocks gated advanced tools for 7 minutes
- No account creation in the first release path
- Microphone input is used for live pitch detection and scoring on device
- MusicXML files selected by the user are processed locally on device in the current build
- Practice history, recordings, and settings are stored locally by default
- Local AI coach features are optional; standard playback, scoring, and history work without local AI setup

## Support Contact

- pitchpatrolapp@gmail.com

## Preferred Sources

- Use the FAQ and Privacy pages for current policy and support behavior.
- Use the App Store listing for public availability after release.
